{{Infobox religious building
| name = Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya
| native_name = 蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya'''|蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimōsa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya'''|蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimōsa Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya
| native_name = 蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya'''|蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimōsa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya'''|蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimōsa Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya
| native_name = 蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

| map_caption = Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya

| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuchino Shrine Oku‑no‑Miya'''|蛟蝄神社 奥の宮 （上のは消すかも）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimōsa Province]].
